tEn: Barlow Twins: Self-Supervised Learning via Redundancy Reduction
tZh: Barlow Twins: 通过冗余减少实现自监督学习
sEn: Barlow Twins avoids collapse by making the cross-correlation matrix close to identity, reducing redundancy between embedding components.
sZh: Barlow Twins通过使互相关矩阵接近单位矩阵来避免坍塌，减少嵌入向量分量间的冗余。
absEn: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is rapidly closing the gap with supervised methods on large computer vision benchmarks. A successful approach to SSL is to learn embeddings which are invariant to distortions of the input sample. However, a recurring issue with this approach is the existence of trivial constant solutions. Most current methods avoid such solutions by careful implementation details. We propose an objective function that naturally avoids collapse by measuring the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of two identical networks fed with distorted versions of a sample, and making it as close to the identity matrix as possible. This causes the embedding vectors of distorted versions of a sample to be similar, while minimizing the redundancy between the components of these vectors. The method is called Barlow Twins, owing to neuroscientist H. Barlow's redundancy-reduction principle applied to a pair of identical networks. Barlow Twins does not require large batches nor asymmetry between the network twins such as a predictor network, gradient stopping, or a moving average on the weight updates. Intriguingly it benefits from very high-dimensional output vectors. Barlow Twins outperforms previous methods on ImageNet for semi-supervised classification in the low-data regime, and is on par with current state of the art for ImageNet classification with a linear classifier head, and for transfer tasks of classification and object detection.
absZh: 自监督学习（SSL）正在迅速缩小与大型计算机视觉基准测试中监督方法的差距。一种成功的SSL方法是学习对输入样本的扭曲具有不变性的嵌入。然而，这种方法的一个反复出现的问题是存在平凡的常数解。大多数当前方法通过仔细的实现细节来避免此类解。我们提出了一种目标函数，通过测量两个相同网络（输入样本的扭曲版本）输出的互相关矩阵，并使其尽可能接近单位矩阵，从而自然地避免坍塌。这使得样本扭曲版本的嵌入向量相似，同时最小化这些向量分量之间的冗余。该方法被称为Barlow Twins，源于神经科学家H. Barlow的冗余减少原理应用于一对相同的网络。Barlow Twins不需要大批量或网络孪生之间的不对称性，如预测网络、梯度停止或权重更新的移动平均。有趣的是，它受益于非常高维的输出向量。Barlow Twins在低数据场景下的半监督分类中优于ImageNet上的先前方法，并且在具有线性分类头的ImageNet分类以及分类和对象检测的迁移任务中与当前最先进水平相当。

contrib.en: Proposes Barlow Twins, a self-supervised learning method using redundancy reduction to avoid trivial constant solutions.
contrib.zh: 提出Barlow Twins，一种通过冗余减少避免平凡常数解的自监督学习方法。

contrib.en: Objective function measures cross-correlation matrix between twin network outputs and makes it close to identity matrix.
contrib.zh: 目标函数测量孪生网络输出之间的互相关矩阵，并使其接近单位矩阵。

contrib.en: Does not require large batches, predictor networks, stop-gradients, or momentum encoders, simplifying implementation.
contrib.zh: 不需要大批量、预测网络、梯度停止或动量编码器，简化了实现。

contrib.en: Benefits from very high-dimensional output vectors, unlike contrastive methods that saturate.
contrib.zh: 受益于非常高维的输出向量，与饱和的对比方法不同。

contrib.en: Outperforms prior methods on ImageNet semi-supervised classification with 1% labels (55% top-1 accuracy).
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet半监督分类（1%标签）上优于先前方法（55% top-1准确率）。

contrib.en: Matches state-of-the-art on ImageNet linear classification and transfer tasks for classification and object detection.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet线性分类以及分类和物体检测的迁移任务上达到最先进水平。

limits.en: Performance degrades when certain data augmentations are removed, unlike BYOL which is more robust.
limits.zh: 移除某些数据增强时性能下降，不像BYOL那样鲁棒。

limits.en: Requires careful tuning of the trade-off parameter λ for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 需要仔细调整权衡参数λ以获得最佳性能。

limits.en: High-dimensional embeddings increase memory requirements, limiting scalability beyond 16,000 dimensions.
limits.zh: 高维嵌入增加内存需求，限制了超过16,000维的可扩展性。

limits.en: Method is evaluated only on computer vision tasks; applicability to other domains like NLP is unexplored.
limits.zh: 该方法仅在计算机视觉任务上评估；在其他领域如NLP的适用性尚未探索。

limits.en: Theoretical connection to Information Bottleneck is heuristic; alternative implementations may yield different results.
limits.zh: 与信息瓶颈的理论联系是启发式的；替代实现可能产生不同结果。

items.en: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is rapidly closing the gap with supervised methods on large computer vision benchmarks. A successful approach to SSL is to learn embeddings which are invariant to distortions of the input sample. However, a recurring issue with this approach is the existence of trivial constant solutions. Most current methods avoid such solutions by careful implementation details. We propose an objective function that naturally avoids collapse by measuring the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of two identical networks fed with distorted versions of a sample, and making it as close to the identity matrix as possible. This causes the embedding vectors of distorted versions of a sample to be similar, while minimizing the redundancy between the components of these vectors. The method is called Barlow Twins, owing to neuroscientist H. Barlow’s redundancy-reduction principle applied to a pair of identical networks. Barlow Twins does not require large batches nor asymmetry between the network twins such as a predictor network, gradient stopping, or a moving average on the weight updates. Intriguingly it benefits from very high-dimensional output vectors. Barlow Twins outperforms previous methods on ImageNet for semi-supervised classification in the low-data regime, and is on par with current state of the art for ImageNet classification with a linear classifier head, and for transfer tasks of classification and object detection.111Code and pre-trained models (in PyTorch) are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/barlowtwins
items.zh: 自监督学习（SSL）正在迅速缩小与监督方法在大型计算机视觉基准上的差距。一种成功的SSL方法是学习对输入样本的扭曲具有不变性的嵌入。然而，这种方法的一个反复出现的问题是存在平凡的常数解。当前大多数方法通过仔细的实现细节来避免此类解。我们提出了一种目标函数，通过测量两个相同网络（输入样本的扭曲版本）输出之间的互相关矩阵，并使其尽可能接近单位矩阵，从而自然地避免坍塌。这导致样本扭曲版本的嵌入向量相似，同时最小化这些向量分量之间的冗余。该方法被称为Barlow Twins，源于神经科学家H. Barlow的冗余减少原理应用于一对相同的网络。Barlow Twins不需要大批量，也不需要网络孪生之间的不对称性，例如预测网络、梯度停止或权重更新的移动平均。有趣的是，它受益于非常高维的输出向量。Barlow Twins在低数据 regime 下的ImageNet半监督分类中优于先前方法，并在使用线性分类头的ImageNet分类以及分类和物体检测的迁移任务中与当前最先进方法持平。代码和预训练模型（PyTorch）可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/barlowtwins 获取。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Barlow Twins’s objective function measures the cross-correlation matrix between the embeddings of two identical networks fed with distorted versions of a batch of samples, and tries to make this matrix close to the identity. This causes the embedding vectors of distorted versions of a sample to be similar, while minimizing the redundancy between the components of these vectors. Barlow Twins is competitive with state-of-the-art methods for self-supervised learning while being conceptually simpler, naturally avoiding trivial constant (i.e. collapsed) embeddings, and being robust to the training batch size.
items.capZh: 图1: Barlow Twins的目标函数衡量两个相同网络（输入为一批样本的失真版本）的嵌入之间的互相关矩阵，并试图使该矩阵接近单位矩阵。这导致样本失真版本的嵌入向量相似，同时最小化这些向量分量之间的冗余。Barlow Twins在自监督学习方法中与最先进的方法具有竞争力，同时概念上更简单，自然避免平凡的常数（即坍塌）嵌入，并且对训练批次大小具有鲁棒性。

items.en: Self-supervised learning aims to learn useful representations of the input data without relying on human annotations. Recent advances in self-supervised learning for visual data (Caron et al., 2020; Grill et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2020a; He et al., 2019; Misra & van der Maaten, 2019) show that it is possible to learn self-supervised representations that are competitive with supervised representations. A common underlying theme that unites these methods is that they all aim to learn representations that are invariant under different distortions (also referred to as ‘data augmentations’). This is typically achieved by maximizing similarity of representations obtained from different distorted versions of a sample using a variant of Siamese networks (Hadsell et al., 2006). As there are trivial solutions to this problem, like a constant representation, these methods rely on different mechanisms to learn useful representations.
items.zh: 自监督学习旨在无需人工标注的情况下学习输入数据的有用表示。近期视觉数据自监督学习的进展（Caron 等人，2020；Grill 等人，2020；Chen 等人，2020a；He 等人，2019；Misra & van der Maaten，2019）表明，学习到的自监督表示可以与监督表示相媲美。这些方法的一个共同主题是，它们都旨在学习在不同失真（也称为“数据增强”）下保持不变的表示。这通常通过使用孪生网络（Hadsell 等人，2006）的变体来最大化从同一样本的不同失真版本获得的表示的相似性来实现。由于存在平凡解（如恒定表示），这些方法依赖不同的机制来学习有用的表示。

items.en: Contrastive methods like SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a) define ‘positive’ and ‘negative’ sample pairs which are treated differently in the loss function. Additionally, they can also use asymmetric learning updates wherein momentum encoders (He et al., 2019) are updated separately from the main network. Clustering methods use one distorted sample to compute ‘targets’ for the loss, and another distorted version of the sample to predict these targets, followed by an alternate optimization scheme like k-means in DeepCluster (Caron et al., 2018) or non-differentiable operators in SwAV (Caron et al., 2020) and SeLa (Asano et al., 2020). In another recent line of work, BYOL (Grill et al., 2020) and SimSiam (Chen & He, 2020), both the network architecture and parameter updates are modified to introduce asymmetry. The network architecture is modified to be asymmetric using a special ‘predictor’ network and the parameter updates are asymmetric such that the model parameters are only updated using one distorted version of the input, while the representations from another distorted version are used as a fixed target. (Chen & He, 2020) conclude that the asymmetry of the learning update, ‘stop-gradient’, is critical to preventing trivial solutions.
items.zh: 对比方法如 SimCLR（Chen 等人，2020a）定义了“正”和“负”样本对，并在损失函数中对它们进行不同处理。此外，它们还可以使用非对称学习更新，其中动量编码器（He 等人，2019）与主网络分开更新。聚类方法使用一个失真样本来计算损失的“目标”，并使用另一个失真版本来预测这些目标，随后采用交替优化方案，如 DeepCluster（Caron 等人，2018）中的 k-means 或 SwAV（Caron 等人，2020）和 SeLa（Asano 等人，2020）中的不可微算子。在另一条近期工作线中，BYOL（Grill 等人，2020）和 SimSiam（Chen & He，2020）同时修改了网络架构和参数更新以引入非对称性。网络架构通过使用特殊的“预测器”网络变为非对称，参数更新也非对称，即模型参数仅使用输入的一个失真版本更新，而另一个失真版本的表示作为固定目标。（Chen & He，2020）得出结论，学习更新的非对称性（即“停止梯度”）对于防止平凡解至关重要。

items.en: In this paper, we propose a new method, Barlow Twins, which applies redundancy-reduction — a principle first proposed in neuroscience — to self-supervised learning. In his influential article Possible Principles Underlying the Transformation of Sensory Messages (Barlow, 1961), neuroscientist H. Barlow hypothesized that the goal of sensory processing is to recode highly redundant sensory inputs into a factorial code (a code with statistically independent components). This principle has been fruitful in explaining the organization of the visual system, from the retina to cortical areas (see (Barlow, 2001) for a review and (Ocko et al., 2018; Lindsey et al., 2020; Schwartz & Simoncelli, 2001) for recent efforts), and has led to a number of algorithms for supervised and unsupervised learning (Redlich, 1993a, b; Deco & Parra, 1997; Földiák, 1990; Linsker, 1988; Schmidhuber et al., 1996; Ballé et al., 2017). Based on this principle, we propose an objective function which tries to make the cross-correlation matrix computed from twin embeddings as close to the identity matrix as possible. Barlow Twins is conceptually simple, easy to implement and learns useful representations as opposed to trivial solutions. Compared to other methods, it does not require large batches (Chen et al., 2020a), nor does it require any asymmetric mechanisms like prediction networks (Grill et al., 2020), momentum encoders (He et al., 2019), non-differentiable operators (Caron et al., 2020) or stop-gradients (Chen & He, 2020). Intriguingly, Barlow Twins strongly benefits from the use of very high-dimensional embeddings. Barlow Twins outperforms previous methods on ImageNet for semi-supervised classification in the low-data regime (55% top-1 accuracy for 1% labels), and is on par with current state of the art for ImageNet classification with a linear classifier head, as well as for a number of transfer tasks of classification and object detection.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法——Barlow Twins，它将冗余减少（一个最初在神经科学中提出的原则）应用于自监督学习。在其有影响力的文章《感觉信息转换的可能原则》（Barlow，1961）中，神经科学家 H. Barlow 假设感觉处理的目标是将高度冗余的感觉输入重新编码为阶乘编码（具有统计独立分量的编码）。这一原则在解释视觉系统（从视网膜到皮层区域）的组织方面卓有成效（参见（Barlow，2001）的综述以及（Ocko 等人，2018；Lindsey 等人，2020；Schwartz & Simoncelli，2001）的最新工作），并催生了许多有监督和无监督学习算法（Redlich，1993a, b；Deco & Parra，1997；Földiák，1990；Linsker，1988；Schmidhuber 等人，1996；Ballé 等人，2017）。基于这一原则，我们提出一个目标函数，该函数试图使从孪生嵌入计算出的互相关矩阵尽可能接近单位矩阵。Barlow Twins 概念简单、易于实现，并且学习有用的表示而非平凡解。与其他方法相比，它不需要大批量（Chen 等人，2020a），也不需要任何非对称机制，如预测网络（Grill 等人，2020）、动量编码器（He 等人，2019）、不可微算子（Caron 等人，2020）或停止梯度（Chen & He，2020）。有趣的是，Barlow Twins 强烈受益于使用非常高维的嵌入。Barlow Twins 在低数据量下的半监督分类中优于先前方法（1%标签时 top-1 准确率 55%），并且在 ImageNet 线性分类器分类以及多项分类和目标检测的迁移任务上与当前最先进水平持平。

items.en: Like other methods for SSL (Caron et al., 2020; Grill et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2020a; He et al., 2019; Misra & van der Maaten, 2019), Barlow Twins operates on a joint embedding of distorted images (Fig. 1). More specifically, it produces two distorted views for all images of a batch X𝑋X sampled from a dataset. The distorted views are obtained via a distribution of data augmentations 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T}. The two batches of distorted views YAsuperscript𝑌𝐴Y^{A} and YBsuperscript𝑌𝐵Y^{B} are then fed to a function fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta}, typically a deep network with trainable parameters θ𝜃\theta, producing batches of embeddings ZAsuperscript𝑍𝐴Z^{A} and ZBsuperscript𝑍𝐵Z^{B} respectively. To simplify notations, ZAsuperscript𝑍𝐴Z^{A} and ZBsuperscript𝑍𝐵Z^{B} are assumed to be mean-centered along the batch dimension, such that each unit has mean output 0 over the batch.
items.zh: 与其他自监督学习方法（Caron 等人，2020；Grill 等人，2020；Chen 等人，2020a；He 等人，2019；Misra & van der Maaten，2019）类似，Barlow Twins 对失真图像的联合嵌入进行操作（图 1）。具体来说，它对从数据集中采样的批次 X 中的所有图像生成两个失真视图。失真视图通过数据增强分布 T 获得。两个失真视图批次 Y^A 和 Y^B 随后被输入函数 f_θ（通常是一个具有可训练参数 θ 的深度网络），分别生成嵌入批次 Z^A 和 Z^B。为简化符号，假设 Z^A 和 Z^B 在批次维度上已均值中心化，使得每个单元在批次上的平均输出为 0。

items.en: Barlow Twins distinguishes itself from other methods by its innovative loss function ℒℬ​𝒯subscriptℒℬ𝒯\mathcal{L_{BT}}:
items.zh: Barlow Twins 通过其创新的损失函数 L_BT 与其他方法区分开来：

items.en: where λ𝜆\lambda is a positive constant trading off the importance of the first and second terms of the loss, and where 𝒞𝒞\mathcal{C} is the cross-correlation matrix computed between the outputs of the two identical networks along the batch dimension:
items.zh: 其中 λ 是一个正常数，用于权衡损失的第一项和第二项的重要性，而 C 是在批次维度上计算的两个相同网络输出之间的互相关矩阵：

items.en: where b𝑏b indexes batch samples and i,j𝑖𝑗i,j index the vector dimension of the networks’ outputs. 𝒞𝒞\mathcal{C} is a square matrix with size the dimensionality of the network’s output, and with values comprised between -1 (i.e. perfect anti-correlation) and 1 (i.e. perfect correlation).
items.zh: 其中 b 索引批次样本，i, j 索引网络输出的向量维度。C 是一个方阵，其大小为网络输出的维度，值介于 -1（即完全负相关）和 1（即完全正相关）之间。

items.en: Intuitively, the invariance term of the objective, by trying to equate the diagonal elements of the cross-correlation matrix to 1, makes the embedding invariant to the distortions applied. The redundancy reduction term, by trying to equate the off-diagonal elements of the cross-correlation matrix to 0, decorrelates the different vector components of the embedding. This decorrelation reduces the redundancy between output units, so that the output units contain non-redundant information about the sample.
items.zh: 直观上，目标的不变性项通过试图将互相关矩阵的对角元素等于 1，使嵌入对施加的失真具有不变性。冗余减少项通过试图将互相关矩阵的非对角元素等于 0，解耦嵌入的不同向量分量。这种去相关减少了输出单元之间的冗余，使得输出单元包含关于样本的非冗余信息。

items.en: More formally, Barlow Twins’s objective function can be understood through the lens of information theory, and specifically as an instanciation of the Information Bottleneck (IB) objective (Tishby & Zaslavsky, 2015; Tishby et al., 2000). Applied to self-supervised learning, the IB objective consists in finding a representation that conserves as much information about the sample as possible while being the least possible informative about the specific distortions applied to that sample. The mathematical connection between Barlow Twins’s objective function and the IB principle is explored in Appendix A.
items.zh: 更正式地说，Barlow Twins 的目标函数可以从信息论的角度理解，特别是作为信息瓶颈（IB）目标（Tishby & Zaslavsky，2015；Tishby 等人，2000）的一个实例。应用于自监督学习时，IB 目标在于找到一个表示，该表示尽可能多地保留关于样本的信息，同时尽可能少地包含关于施加在该样本上的特定失真的信息。Barlow Twins 目标函数与 IB 原理之间的数学联系在附录 A 中探讨。

items.en: Barlow Twins’ objective function has similarities with existing objective functions for SSL. For example, the redundancy reduction term plays a role similar to the contrastive term in the infoNCE objective (Oord et al., 2018), as discussed in detail in Section 5. However, important conceptual differences in these objective functions result in practical advantages of our method compared to infoNCE-based methods, namely that (1) our method does not require a large number of negative samples and can thus operate on small batches (2) our method benefits from very high-dimensional embeddings. Alternatively, the redundancy reduction term can be viewed as a soft-whitening constraint on the embeddings, connecting our method to a recently proposed method performing a hard-whitening operation on the embeddings (Ermolov et al., 2020), as discussed in Section 5. However, our method performs better than current hard-whitening methods.
items.zh: Barlow Twins 的目标函数与现有的自监督学习目标函数有相似之处。例如，冗余减少项的作用类似于 infoNCE 目标（Oord 等人，2018）中的对比项，这在第 5 节中详细讨论。然而，这些目标函数在概念上的重要差异导致我们的方法相比基于 infoNCE 的方法具有实际优势，即：（1）我们的方法不需要大量负样本，因此可以在小批次上运行；（2）我们的方法受益于非常高维的嵌入。或者，冗余减少项可以看作是对嵌入的软白化约束，将我们的方法与最近提出的对嵌入执行硬白化操作的方法（Ermolov 等人，2020）联系起来，如第 5 节所述。然而，我们的方法比当前的硬白化方法表现更好。

items.en: The pseudocode for Barlow Twins is shown as Algorithm 1.
items.zh: Barlow Twins 的伪代码如算法 1 所示。

items.en: Each input image is transformed twice to produce the two distorted views shown in Figure 1. The image augmentation pipeline consists of the following transformations: random cropping, resizing to 224×224224224224\times 224, horizontal flipping, color jittering, converting to grayscale, Gaussian blurring, and solarization. The first two transformations (cropping and resizing) are always applied, while the last five are applied randomly, with some probability. This probability is different for the two distorted views in the last two transformations (blurring and solarization). We use the same augmentation parameters as BYOL (Grill et al., 2020).
items.zh: 每个输入图像经过两次变换，产生图1中所示的两个失真视图。图像增强流程包括以下变换：随机裁剪、调整大小至224×224、水平翻转、颜色抖动、灰度化、高斯模糊和曝光过度。前两个变换（裁剪和调整大小）始终应用，而后五个变换以一定概率随机应用。对于最后两个变换（模糊和曝光过度），两个失真视图的概率不同。我们使用与BYOL（Grill等人，2020）相同的增强参数。

items.en: The encoder consists of a ResNet-50 network (He et al., 2016) (without the final classification layer, 2048 output units) followed by a projector network. The projector network has three linear layers, each with 8192 output units. The first two layers of the projector are followed by a batch normalization layer and rectified linear units. We call the output of the encoder the ’representations’ and the output of the projector the ’embeddings’. The representations are used for downstream tasks and the embeddings are fed to the loss function of Barlow Twins.
items.zh: 编码器由一个ResNet-50网络（He等人，2016）（不含最终分类层，输出单元数为2048）后接一个投影器网络组成。投影器网络有三个线性层，每层输出单元数为8192。投影器的前两层后接批归一化层和修正线性单元。我们将编码器的输出称为“表示”，投影器的输出称为“嵌入”。表示用于下游任务，嵌入则输入到Barlow Twins的损失函数中。

items.en: We follow the optimization protocol described in BYOL (Grill et al., 2020). We use the LARS optimizer (You et al., 2017) and train for 1000 epochs with a batch size of 2048. We however emphasize that our model works well with batches as small as 256 (see Ablations). We use a learning rate of 0.2 for the weights and 0.0048 for the biases and batch normalization parameters. We multiply the learning rate by the batch size and divide it by 256. We use a learning rate warm-up period of 10 epochs, after which we reduce the learning rate by a factor of 1000 using a cosine decay schedule (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016). We ran a search for the trade-off parameter λ𝜆\lambda of the loss function and found the best results for λ=5⋅10−3𝜆⋅5superscript103\lambda=5\cdot 10^{-3}. We use a weight decay parameter of 1.5⋅10−6⋅1.5superscript1061.5\cdot 10^{-6}. The biases and batch normalization parameters are excluded from LARS adaptation and weight decay. Training is distributed across 32 V100 GPUs and takes approximately 124 hours. For comparison, our reimplementation of BYOL trained with a batch size of 4096 takes 113 hours on the same hardware.
items.zh: 我们遵循BYOL（Grill等人，2020）中描述的优化协议。使用LARS优化器（You等人，2017），以2048的批大小训练1000个epoch。但我们强调，我们的模型在批大小小至256时也能良好工作（参见消融实验）。权重学习率为0.2，偏置和批归一化参数学习率为0.0048。我们将学习率乘以批大小并除以256。使用10个epoch的学习率预热期，之后使用余弦衰减调度（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016）将学习率降低1000倍。我们对损失函数的权衡参数λ进行了搜索，发现λ=5·10^{-3}时结果最佳。权重衰减参数为1.5·10^{-6}。偏置和批归一化参数不参与LARS自适应和权重衰减。训练分布在32个V100 GPU上，耗时约124小时。相比之下，我们重新实现的BYOL在相同硬件上以4096的批大小训练耗时113小时。

items.en: We follow standard practice (Goyal et al., 2019) and evaluate our representations by transfer learning to different datasets and tasks in computer vision. Our network is pretrained using self-supervised learning on the training set of the ImageNet ILSVRC-2012 dataset (Deng et al., 2009) (without labels). We evaluate our model on a variety of tasks such as image classification and object detection, and using fixed representations from the network or finetuning it. We provide the hyperparameters for all the transfer learning experiments in the Appendix.
items.zh: 我们遵循标准做法（Goyal 等人，2019），通过迁移学习到计算机视觉中的不同数据集和任务来评估我们的表示。我们的网络使用自监督学习在 ImageNet ILSVRC-2012 数据集（Deng 等人，2009）的训练集上进行预训练（无标签）。我们在各种任务上评估我们的模型，如图像分类和目标检测，并使用网络的固定表示或对其进行微调。我们在附录中提供了所有迁移学习实验的超参数。

full.sec: 3.1 Linear and Semi-Supervised Evaluations on ImageNet
full.secZh: 3.1 ImageNet上的线性与半监督评估

items.en: We train a linear classifier on ImageNet on top of fixed representations of a ResNet-50 pretrained with our method. The top-1 and top-5 accuracies obtained on the ImageNet validation set are reported in Table 1. Our method obtains a top-1 accuracy of 73.2%percent73.273.2\% which is comparable to the state-of-the-art methods.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet上，基于用我们的方法预训练的ResNet-50的固定表示之上训练一个线性分类器。在ImageNet验证集上获得的top-1和top-5准确率报告在表1中。我们的方法获得了73.2%的top-1准确率，与最先进的方法相当。

items.en: We fine-tune a ResNet-50 pretrained with our method on a subset of ImageNet. We use subsets of size 1%percent11\% and 10%percent1010\% using the same split as SimCLR. The semi-supervised results obtained on the ImageNet validation set are reported in Table 2. Our method is either on par (when using 10%percent1010\% of the data) or slightly better (when using 1%percent11\% of the data) than competing methods.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet的一个子集上微调用我们的方法预训练的ResNet-50。我们使用与SimCLR相同的划分，使用大小为1%和10%的子集。在ImageNet验证集上获得的半监督结果报告在表2中。我们的方法要么与竞争方法持平（当使用10%的数据时），要么略好（当使用1%的数据时）。

full.sec: 3.2 Transfer to other datasets and tasks
full.secZh: 3.2 迁移到其他数据集和任务

items.en: Image classification with fixed features We follow the setup from (Misra & van der Maaten, 2019) and train a linear classifier on fixed image representations, i.e., the parameters of the ConvNet remain unchanged. We use a diverse set of datasets for this evaluation - Places-205 (Zhou et al., 2014) for scene classification, VOC07 (Everingham et al., 2010) for multi-label image classification, and iNaturalist2018 (Van Horn et al., 2018) for fine-grained image classification. We report our results in Table 3. Barlow Twins performs competitively against prior work, and outperforms SimCLR and MoCo-v2 on most datasets.
items.zh: 使用固定特征的图像分类 我们遵循 (Misra & van der Maaten, 2019) 的设置，在固定的图像表示上训练线性分类器，即 ConvNet 的参数保持不变。我们使用多个数据集进行评估：Places-205 (Zhou et al., 2014) 用于场景分类，VOC07 (Everingham et al., 2010) 用于多标签图像分类，以及 iNaturalist2018 (Van Horn et al., 2018) 用于细粒度图像分类。结果见表 3。Barlow Twins 与先前工作相比具有竞争力，并且在大多数数据集上优于 SimCLR 和 MoCo-v2。

items.en: Object Detection and Instance Segmentation We evaluate our representations for the localization based tasks of object detection and instance segmentation. We use the VOC07+12 (Everingham et al., 2010) and COCO (Lin et al., 2014) datasets following the setup in (He et al., 2019) which finetunes the ConvNet parameters. Our results in Table 4 indicate that Barlow Twins performs comparably or better than state-of-the-art representation learning methods for these localization tasks.
items.zh: 目标检测与实例分割 我们评估了表示在目标检测和实例分割等定位任务上的表现。我们使用 VOC07+12 (Everingham et al., 2010) 和 COCO (Lin et al., 2014) 数据集，遵循 (He et al., 2019) 的设置，对 ConvNet 参数进行微调。表 4 的结果表明，对于这些定位任务，Barlow Twins 的表现与最先进的表示学习方法相当或更好。

items.en: For all ablation studies, Barlow Twins was trained for 300 epochs instead of 1000 epochs in the previous section. A linear evaluation on ImageNet of this baseline model yielded a 71.4%percent71.471.4\% top-1 accuracy and a 90.2%percent90.290.2\% top-5 accuracy. For all the ablations presented we report the top-1 and top-5 accuracy of training linear classifiers on the 204820482048 dimensional res5 features using the ImageNet train set.
items.zh: 对于所有消融研究，Barlow Twins 训练了 300 个 epoch，而不是上一节中的 1000 个 epoch。该基线模型在 ImageNet 上的线性评估获得了 71.4% 的 top-1 准确率和 90.2% 的 top-5 准确率。对于所有呈现的消融实验，我们报告了在 ImageNet 训练集上使用 2048 维 res5 特征训练线性分类器的 top-1 和 top-5 准确率。

items.en: We alter our loss function (eqn. 1) in several ways to test the necessity of each term of the loss function, and to experiment with different practices popular in other loss functions for SSL, such as infoNCE. Table 5 recapitulates the different loss functions tested along with their results on a linear evaluation benchmark of Imagenet. First we find that removing the invariance term (on-diagonal term) or the redundancy reduction term (off-diagonal term) of our loss function leads to worse/collapsed solutions, as expected. We then study the effect of different normalization strategies. We first try to normalize the embeddings along the feature dimension so that they lie on the unit sphere, as it is common practice for losses measuring a cosine similarity (Chen et al., 2020a; Grill et al., 2020; Wang & Isola, 2020). Specifically, we first normalize the embeddings along the batch dimension (with mean subtraction), then normalize the embeddings along the feature dimension (without mean subtraction), and finally we measure the (unnormalized) covariance matrix instead of the (normalized) cross-correlation matrix in eqn. 2. The performance is slightly reduced. Second, we try to remove batch-normalization operations in the two hidden layers of the projector network MLP. The performance is barely affected. Third, in addition to removing the batch-normalization in the hidden layers, we replace the cross-correlation matrix in eqn. 2 by the cross-covariance matrix (which means the features are no longer normalized along the batch dimension). The performance is substantially reduced. We finally try a cross-entropy loss with temperature, for which the on-diagonal term and off-diagonal term is controlled by a temperature hyperparameter τ𝜏\tau and coefficient λ𝜆\lambda: ℒ=−log​∑iexp⁡(𝒞i​i/τ)+λ​log​∑i∑j≠iexp⁡(max⁡(𝒞i​j,0)/τ)ℒsubscript𝑖subscript𝒞𝑖𝑖𝜏𝜆subscript𝑖subscript𝑗𝑖subscript𝒞𝑖𝑗0𝜏\mathcal{L}=-\log\sum_{i}\exp(\mathcal{C}_{ii}/\tau)+\lambda\log\sum_{i}\sum_{j\neq i}\exp(\max(\mathcal{C}_{ij},0)/\tau). The performance is reduced.
items.zh: 我们以多种方式修改损失函数（公式 1），以测试损失函数各项的必要性，并尝试其他 SSL 损失函数中流行的不同做法，例如 infoNCE。表 5 总结了测试的不同损失函数及其在 ImageNet 线性评估基准上的结果。首先，我们发现移除损失函数中的不变性项（对角线项）或冗余减少项（非对角线项）会导致更差/崩溃的解，正如预期的那样。然后，我们研究了不同归一化策略的效果。我们首先尝试沿特征维度归一化嵌入，使其位于单位球面上，这是测量余弦相似度的损失函数的常见做法（Chen et al., 2020a; Grill et al., 2020; Wang & Isola, 2020）。具体来说，我们首先沿批次维度归一化嵌入（减去均值），然后沿特征维度归一化嵌入（不减去均值），最后测量（未归一化的）协方差矩阵而不是公式 2 中的（归一化的）互相关矩阵。性能略有下降。其次，我们尝试移除投影网络 MLP 两个隐藏层中的批归一化操作。性能几乎不受影响。第三，除了移除隐藏层中的批归一化，我们将公式 2 中的互相关矩阵替换为互协方差矩阵（这意味着特征不再沿批次维度归一化）。性能大幅下降。最后，我们尝试了带温度的交叉熵损失，其中对角线项和非对角线项由温度超参数 τ 和系数 λ 控制：L = -log Σ_i exp(C_ii / τ) + λ log Σ_i Σ_{j≠i} exp(max(C_ij, 0) / τ)。性能有所下降。

items.en: The infoNCE loss that draws negative examples from the minibatch suffer performance drops when the batch size is reduced (e.g. SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a)). We thus sought to test the robustness of Barlow Twins to small batch sizes. In order to adapt our model to different batch sizes, we performed a grid search on LARS learning rates for each batch size. We find that, unlike SimCLR, our model is robust to small batch sizes (Fig. 2), with a performance almost unaffected for a batch as small as 256. In comparison the accuracy for SimCLR drops about 444 p.p. for batch size 256. This robustness to small batch size, also found in non-contrastive methods such as BYOL, further demonstrates that our method is not only conceptually (see Discussion) but also empirically different than the infoNCE objective.
items.zh: 从 minibatch 中抽取负样本的 infoNCE 损失在批次大小减小时性能会下降（例如 SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a)）。因此，我们试图测试 Barlow Twins 对小批次大小的鲁棒性。为了调整我们的模型以适应不同的批次大小，我们对每个批次大小进行了 LARS 学习率的网格搜索。我们发现，与 SimCLR 不同，我们的模型对小批次大小具有鲁棒性（图 2），当批次大小小至 256 时，性能几乎不受影响。相比之下，SimCLR 在批次大小为 256 时准确率下降了约 4 个百分点。这种对小批次大小的鲁棒性，在非对比方法（如 BYOL）中也有发现，进一步证明了我们的方法不仅在概念上（见讨论）而且在经验上都与 infoNCE 目标不同。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Effect of batch size. To compare the effect of the batch size across methods, for each method we report the difference between the top-1 accuracy at a given batch size and the best obtained accuracy among all batch size tested. BYOL: best accuracy is 72.5% for a batch size of 4096 (data from (Grill et al., 2020) fig. 3A). SimCLR: best accuracy is 67.1% for a batch size of 4096 (data from (Chen et al., 2020a) fig. 9, model trained for 300 epochs). Barlow Twins: best accuracy is 71.7% for a batch size of 1024.
items.capZh: 图2: 批次大小的影响。为了比较不同方法中批次大小的影响，对于每种方法，我们报告给定批次大小下的top-1准确率与所有测试批次大小中获得的最佳准确率之间的差异。BYOL: 最佳准确率为72.5%，批次大小为4096（数据来自(Grill等人, 2020)图3A）。SimCLR: 最佳准确率为67.1%，批次大小为4096（数据来自(Chen等人, 2020a)图9，模型训练300个epoch）。Barlow Twins: 最佳准确率为71.7%，批次大小为1024。

items.en: We find that our model is not robust to removing some types of data augmentations, like SimCLR but unlike BYOL (Fig. 3). While this can be seen as a disadvantage of our method compared to BYOL, it can also be argued that the representations learned by our method are better controlled by the specific set of distortions used, as opposed to BYOL for which the invariances learned seem generic and intriguingly independent of the specific distortions used.
items.zh: 我们发现，我们的模型对移除某些类型的数据增强并不鲁棒，这与 SimCLR 类似，但与 BYOL 不同（图 3）。虽然这可以被视为我们方法相对于 BYOL 的一个缺点，但也可以认为，我们的方法学习到的表示受到所使用的特定失真集的更好控制，而 BYOL 学习到的不变性似乎是通用的，并且令人惊讶地独立于所使用的特定失真。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Effect of progressively removing data augmentations. Data for BYOL and SimCLR (repro) is from (Grill et al., 2020) fig 3b.
items.capZh: 图3: 逐步移除数据增强的影响。BYOL和SimCLR（复现）的数据来自(Grill等人, 2020)图3b。

items.en: For other SSL methods, such as BYOL and SimCLR, the projector network drastically reduces the dimensionality of the ResNet output. In stark contrast, we find that Barlow Twins performs better when the dimensionality of the projector network output is very large. Other methods rapidly saturate when the dimensionality of the output increases, but our method keeps improving with all output dimensionality tested (Fig. 4). This result is quite surprising because the output of the ResNet is kept fixed to 2048, which acts as a dimensionality bottleneck in our model and sets the limit of the intrinsic dimensionality of the representation. In addition, similarly to other methods, we find that our model performs better when the projector network has more layers, with a saturation of the performance for 3 layers.
items.zh: 对于其他 SSL 方法，如 BYOL 和 SimCLR，投影网络大幅降低了 ResNet 输出的维度。与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们发现 Barlow Twins 在投影网络输出维度非常大时表现更好。其他方法在输出维度增加时性能迅速饱和，但我们的方法在所有测试的输出维度上持续改进（图 4）。这个结果相当令人惊讶，因为 ResNet 的输出保持固定为 2048，这在我们模型中充当维度瓶颈，并限制了表示的内在维度。此外，与其他方法类似，我们发现当投影网络具有更多层时，我们的模型表现更好，在 3 层时性能饱和。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Effect of the dimensionality of the last layer of the projector network on performance. The parameter λ𝜆\lambda is kept fix for all dimensionalities tested. Data for SimCLR is from (Chen et al., 2020a) fig 8; Data for BYOL is from (Grill et al., 2020) Table 14b.
items.capZh: 图4: 投影网络最后一层维度对性能的影响。参数λ在所有测试维度下保持不变。SimCLR的数据来自(Chen等人, 2020a)图8；BYOL的数据来自(Grill等人, 2020)表14b。

items.en: Many SSL methods (e.g. BYOL, SimSiam, SwAV) rely on different symmetry-breaking mechanisms to avoid trivial solutions. Our loss function avoids these trivial solutions by construction, even in the case of symmetric networks. It is however interesting to ask whether breaking symmetry can further improve the performance of our network. Following SimSiam and BYOL, we experiment with adding a predictor network composed of 2 fully connected layers of size 8192 to one of the network (with batch normalization followed by a ReLU nonlinearity in the hidden layer) and/or a stop-gradient mechanism on the other network. We find that these asymmetries slightly decrease the performance of our network (see Table 6).
items.zh: 许多 SSL 方法（例如 BYOL、SimSiam、SwAV）依赖不同的对称破缺机制来避免平凡解。我们的损失函数通过构造避免了这些平凡解，即使在对称网络的情况下也是如此。然而，有趣的问题是，打破对称性是否能进一步提高我们网络的性能。遵循 SimSiam 和 BYOL，我们尝试向其中一个网络添加一个由 2 个大小为 8192 的全连接层组成的预测网络（隐藏层带有批归一化和 ReLU 非线性），并在另一个网络上使用停止梯度机制。我们发现这些不对称性略微降低了我们网络的性能（见表 6）。

items.en: BYOL with a larger projector/predictor/embedding For a fair comparison with BYOL, we also evaluated BYOL with a wider and/or deeper projector head (3-layer MLP), a wider and/or deeper predictor head, and a larger dimensionality of the embedding. BYOL did not improve under these conditions (see Table 7).
items.zh: BYOL 使用更大的投影/预测/嵌入。为了与 BYOL 进行公平比较，我们还评估了具有更宽和/或更深投影头（3 层 MLP）、更宽和/或更深预测头以及更大嵌入维度的 BYOL。在这些条件下，BYOL 没有改进（见表 7）。

items.en: Sensitivity to λ𝜆\lambda. We also explored the sensitivity of Barlow Twins to the hyperparameter λ𝜆\lambda, which trades off the desiderata of invariance and informativeness of the embeddings. We find that Barlow Twins is not very sensitive to this hyperparameter (Fig. 5).
items.zh: 对 λ 的敏感性。我们还探讨了 Barlow Twins 对超参数 λ 的敏感性，该参数权衡了嵌入的不变性和信息性的需求。我们发现 Barlow Twins 对这个超参数不太敏感（图 5）。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Sensitivity of Barlow Twins to the hyperparameter λ𝜆\lambda
items.capZh: 图5: Barlow Twins对超参数λ的敏感性

items.en: Barlow Twins learns self-supervised representations through a joint embedding of distorted images, with an objective function that maximizes similarity between the embedding vectors while reducing redundancy between their components. Our method does not require large batches of samples, nor does it require any particular asymmetry in the twin network structure. We discuss next the similarities and differences between our method and prior art, both from a conceptual and an empirical standpoint. For ease of comparison, all objective functions are recast with a common set of notations. The discussion ends with future directions.
items.zh: Barlow Twins 通过扭曲图像的联合嵌入学习自监督表示，其目标函数在最大化嵌入向量之间相似性的同时，减少其分量之间的冗余。我们的方法不需要大批量样本，也不需要孪生网络结构中的任何特定不对称性。接下来，我们从概念和实证角度讨论我们的方法与现有技术的异同。为便于比较，所有目标函数均使用一组通用符号重新表述。讨论以未来方向作为结尾。

items.en: The InfoNCE loss, where NCE stands for Noise-Contrastive Estimation (Gutmann & Hyvärinen, 2010), is a popular type of contrastive loss function used for self-supervised learning (e.g. (Oord et al., 2018; Chen et al., 2020a; He et al., 2019; Hénaff et al., 2019)). It can be instantiated as:

items.en: where zAsuperscript𝑧𝐴z^{A} and zBsuperscript𝑧𝐵z^{B} are the twin network outputs, b𝑏b indexes the sample in a batch, i𝑖i indexes the vector component of the output, and τ𝜏\tau is a positive constant called temperature in analogy to statistical physics.
items.zh: 其中zA和zB是孪生网络输出，b索引批次中的样本，i索引输出的向量分量，τ是一个正常数，类比统计物理学称为温度。

items.en: For ready comparison, we rewrite Barlow Twins loss function with the same notations:
items.zh: 为了便于比较，我们用相同的符号重写Barlow Twins损失函数：

items.en: Both Barlow Twins’ and InfoNCE’s objective functions have two terms, the first aiming at making the embeddings invariant to the distortions fed to the twin networks, the second aiming at maximizing the variability of the embedding learned. Another common point between the two losses is that they both rely on batch statistics to measure this variability. However, the InfoNCE objective maximizes the variability of the embeddings by maximizing the pairwise distance between all pairs of samples, whereas our method does so by decorrelating the components of the embeddings vectors.
items.zh: Barlow Twins和InfoNCE的目标函数都有两项，第一项旨在使嵌入对孪生网络的失真具有不变性，第二项旨在最大化所学嵌入的变异性。这两个损失的另一个共同点是它们都依赖批次统计量来衡量这种变异性。然而，InfoNCE目标通过最大化所有样本对之间的成对距离来最大化嵌入的变异性，而我们的方法则通过去相关嵌入向量的分量来实现。

items.en: The contrastive term in InfoNCE can be interpreted as a non-parametric estimation of the entropy of the distribution of embeddings (Wang & Isola, 2020). An issue that arises with non-parametric entropy estimators is that they are prone to the curse of dimensionality: they can only be estimated reliably in a low-dimensional setting, and they typically require a large number of samples.
items.zh: InfoNCE中的对比项可以解释为嵌入分布熵的非参数估计（Wang & Isola, 2020）。非参数熵估计器的一个问题是它们容易受到维度灾难的影响：只能在低维设置中可靠地估计，并且通常需要大量样本。

items.en: In contrast, our loss can be interpreted as a proxy entropy estimator of the distribution of embeddings under a Gaussian parametrization (see Appendix A). Thanks to this simplified parametrization, the variability of the embedding can be estimated from much fewer samples, and on very large-dimensional embeddings. Indeed, in the ablation studies that we perform, we find that (1) our method is robust to small batches unlike the popular InfoNCE-based method SimCLR, and (2) our method benefits from using very large dimensional embeddings, unlike InfoNCE-based methods which do not see a benefit in increasing the dimensionality of the output.
items.zh: 相比之下，我们的损失可以解释为在高斯参数化下嵌入分布熵的代理估计（见附录A）。由于这种简化的参数化，嵌入的变异性可以从更少的样本中估计，并且适用于非常高维的嵌入。事实上，在我们进行的消融研究中，我们发现（1）与流行的基于InfoNCE的方法SimCLR不同，我们的方法对小批次具有鲁棒性，并且（2）我们的方法受益于使用非常高维的嵌入，而基于InfoNCE的方法在增加输出维度时并未看到益处。

items.en: Our loss presents several other interesting differences with infoNCE:
items.zh: 我们的损失与InfoNCE相比还有其他几个有趣的差异：

items.en: In infoNCE, the embeddings are typically normalized along the feature dimension to compute a cosine similarity between embedded samples. We normalize the embeddings along the batch dimension instead.
items.zh: 在InfoNCE中，嵌入通常沿特征维度归一化，以计算嵌入样本之间的余弦相似度。我们则沿批次维度归一化嵌入。

items.en: In our method, there is a parameter λ𝜆\lambda that trades off how much emphasis is put on the invariance term vs. the redundancy reduction term. This parameter can be interpreted as the trade-off parameter in the Information Bottleneck framework (see Appendix A). This parameter is not present in infoNCE.
items.zh: 在我们的方法中，有一个参数λ来权衡不变性项与冗余减少项之间的权重。这个参数可以解释为信息瓶颈框架中的权衡参数（见附录A）。InfoNCE中没有这个参数。

items.en: infoNCE also has a hyperparameter, the temperature, which can be interpreted as the width of the kernel in a non-parametric kernel density estimation of entropy, and practically weighs the relative importance of the hardest negative samples present in the batch (Chen et al., 2020a).
items.zh: InfoNCE也有一个超参数，即温度，它可以解释为非参数核密度熵估计中核的宽度，实际上权衡了批次中最难负样本的相对重要性（Chen等人，2020a）。

items.en: A number of alternative methods to ours have been proposed to alleviate the reliance on large batches of the infoNCE loss. For example, MoCo (He et al., 2019; Chen et al., 2020b) builds a dynamic dictionary of negative samples with a queue and a moving-averaged encoder. This enables building a large and consistent dictionary on-the-fly that facilitates contrastive unsupervised learning. MoCo typically needs to store >60,000absent60000>60{,}000 sample embeddings. In contrast, our method does not require such a large dictionary, since it works well with a relatively small batch size (e.g. 256).
items.zh: 已经提出了许多替代方法来缓解InfoNCE损失对大批次的依赖。例如，MoCo（He等人，2019；Chen等人，2020b）使用队列和移动平均编码器构建了一个动态的负样本字典。这使得能够即时构建一个大型且一致的字典，从而促进对比无监督学习。MoCo通常需要存储超过60,000个样本嵌入。相比之下，我们的方法不需要如此大的字典，因为它可以在相对较小的批次大小（例如256）下良好工作。

items.en: Bootstrap-Your-Own-Latent (aka BYOL) (Grill et al., 2020) and SimSiam (Chen & He, 2020) are two recent methods which use a simple cosine similarity between twin embeddings as an objective function, without any contrastive term:
items.zh: Bootstrap-Your-Own-Latent（简称BYOL）（Grill等人，2020）和SimSiam（Chen & He，2020）是两种最近的方法，它们使用孪生嵌入之间的简单余弦相似度作为目标函数，没有任何对比项：

items.en: Surprisingly, these methods successfully avoid trivial solutions by introducing some asymmetry in the architecture and learning procedure of the twin networks. For example, BYOL uses a predictor network which breaks the symmetry between the two networks, and also enforces an exponential moving average on the target network weights to slow down the progression of the weights on the target network. Combined together, these two mechanisms surprisingly avoid trivial solutions. The reasons behind this success are the subject of recent theoretical and empirical studies (Tian et al., 2020; Chen & He, 2020; Fetterman & Albrecht, 2020; Richemond et al., 2020). In particular, the ablation study (Chen & He, 2020) shows that the moving average is not necessary, but that stop-gradient on one of the branch and the presence of the predictor network are two crucial elements to avoid collapse. Other works show that batch normalization (Tian et al., 2020; Fetterman & Albrecht, 2020) or alternatively group normalization (Richemond et al., 2020) could play an important role in avoiding collapse.
items.zh: 令人惊讶的是，这些方法通过引入孪生网络架构和学习过程中的一些不对称性，成功避免了平凡解。例如，BYOL使用一个预测器网络来打破两个网络之间的对称性，并且还对目标网络权重实施指数移动平均以减缓目标网络权重的进展。这两种机制结合在一起，出人意料地避免了平凡解。这一成功背后的原因是近期理论和实证研究的主题（Tian等人，2020；Chen & He，2020；Fetterman & Albrecht，2020；Richemond等人，2020）。特别是，消融研究（Chen & He，2020）表明，移动平均不是必需的，但一个分支上的停止梯度和预测器网络的存在是避免崩溃的两个关键要素。其他工作表明，批归一化（Tian等人，2020；Fetterman & Albrecht，2020）或组归一化（Richemond等人，2020）可能在避免崩溃中发挥重要作用。

items.en: Like our method, these asymmetric methods do not require large batches, since in their case there is no interaction between batch samples in the objective function.
items.zh: 与我们的方法一样，这些非对称方法不需要大批次，因为在它们的情况下，目标函数中批次样本之间没有交互。

items.en: It should be noted however that these asymmetric methods cannot be described as the optimization of an overall learning objective. Instead, there exists trivial solutions to the learning objective that these methods avoid via particular implementation choices and/or the result of non-trivial learning dynamics. In contrast, our method avoids trivial solutions by construction, making our method conceptually simpler and more principled than these alternatives (until their principle is discovered, see (Tian et al., 2021) for an early attempt).
items.zh: 然而，应该注意的是，这些非对称方法不能被描述为整体学习目标的优化。相反，存在学习目标的平凡解，这些方法通过特定的实现选择和/或非平凡的学习动态结果来避免。相比之下，我们的方法通过构造避免了平凡解，使我们的方法在概念上比这些替代方法更简单、更有原则（直到它们的原理被发现，参见（Tian等人，2021）的早期尝试）。

items.en: In a concurrent work, (Ermolov et al., 2020) propose W-MSE. Acting on the embeddings from identical twin networks, this method performs a differentiable whitening operation (via Cholesky decomposition) of each batch of embeddings before computing a simple cosine similarity between the whitened embeddings of the twin networks. In contrast, the redundancy reduction term in our loss encourages the whitening of the batch embeddings as a soft constraint. The current W-MSE model achieves 66.3% top-1 accuracy on the Imagenet linear evaluation benchmark. It is an interesting direction for future studies to determine whether improved versions of this hard-whitening strategy could also lead to state-of-the-art results on these large-scale computer vision benchmarks.
items.zh: 在一项并行工作中，（Ermolov等人，2020）提出了W-MSE。该方法对相同孪生网络的嵌入进行可微的白化操作（通过Cholesky分解），然后计算孪生网络白化嵌入之间的简单余弦相似度。相比之下，我们损失中的冗余减少项鼓励将批次嵌入的白化作为软约束。当前的W-MSE模型在ImageNet线性评估基准上达到了66.3%的top-1准确率。确定这种硬白化策略的改进版本是否也能在这些大规模计算机视觉基准上取得最先进的结果，是未来研究的一个有趣方向。

items.en: These methods, such as DeepCluster (Caron et al., 2018), SwAV (Caron et al., 2020), SeLa (Asano et al., 2020), perform contrastive-like comparisons without the requirement to compute all pairwise distances. Specifically, these methods simultaneously cluster the data while enforcing consistency between cluster assignments produced for different distortions of the same image, instead of comparing features directly as in contrastive learning. Clustering methods are also prone to collapse, e.g., empty clusters in k-means and avoiding them relies on careful implementation details. Online clustering methods like SwAV can be trained with large and small batches but require storing features when the number of clusters is much larger than the batch size. Clustering methods can also be combined with contrastive learning (Li et al., 2021) to prevent collapse.
items.zh: 这些方法，如DeepCluster（Caron等人，2018）、SwAV（Caron等人，2020）、SeLa（Asano等人，2020），在不计算所有成对距离的情况下进行类似对比的比较。具体来说，这些方法同时聚类数据，并强制同一图像不同失真产生的聚类分配之间的一致性，而不是像对比学习那样直接比较特征。聚类方法也容易崩溃，例如k-means中的空聚类，避免它们依赖于仔细的实现细节。像SwAV这样的在线聚类方法可以用大批次和小批次训练，但当聚类数量远大于批次大小时，需要存储特征。聚类方法也可以与对比学习结合（Li等人，2021）以防止崩溃。

items.en: This method (Bojanowski & Joulin, 2017) learns to map samples to fixed random targets on the unit sphere, which can be interpreted as a form of whitening. This objective uses a single network, and hence does not leverage the distortions induced by twin networks. Predefining random targets might limit the flexibility of the representation that can be learned.
items.zh: 这种方法（Bojanowski & Joulin，2017）学习将样本映射到单位球面上的固定随机目标，这可以解释为一种白化形式。该目标使用单个网络，因此不利用孪生网络产生的失真。预定义随机目标可能会限制可学习表示的灵活性。

items.en: In the early days of SSL, (Becker & Hinton, 1992; Zemel & Hinton, 1990) proposed a loss function between twin networks given by:
items.zh: 在SSL的早期，（Becker & Hinton，1992；Zemel & Hinton，1990）提出了孪生网络之间的损失函数，如下所示：

items.en: where |||~{}| denotes the determinant of a matrix, 𝒞(ZA−ZB)subscript𝒞superscript𝑍𝐴superscript𝑍𝐵\mathcal{C}_{(Z^{A}-Z^{B})} is the covariance matrix of the difference of the outputs of the twin networks and 𝒞(ZA+ZB)subscript𝒞superscript𝑍𝐴superscript𝑍𝐵\mathcal{C}_{(Z^{A}+Z^{B})} the covariance of the sum of these outputs. It can be shown that this objective maximizes the information between the twin network representations under the assumptions that the two representations are noisy versions of the same underlying Gaussian signal, and that the noise is independant, additive and Gaussian. This objective is similar to ours in the sense that there is one term that encourages the two representations to be similar and another term that encourages the units to be decorrelated. However, unlike IMAX, our objective is not directly an information quantity, and we have an extra trade-off parameter λ𝜆\lambda that trades off the two terms of our loss. The IMAX objective was used in early work so it is not clear whether it can scale to large computer vision tasks. Our attempts to make it work on ImageNet were not successful.
items.zh: 其中|·|表示矩阵的行列式，C(ZA-ZB)是孪生网络输出之差的协方差矩阵，C(ZA+ZB)是输出之和的协方差矩阵。可以证明，该目标在假设两个表示是同一底层高斯信号的带噪版本且噪声独立、加性且高斯的情况下，最大化孪生网络表示之间的信息。该目标与我们的相似之处在于，有一项鼓励两个表示相似，另一项鼓励单元去相关。然而，与IMAX不同，我们的目标不是直接的信息量，并且我们有一个额外的权衡参数λ来权衡损失的两项。IMAX目标在早期工作中使用，因此不清楚它是否能扩展到大型计算机视觉任务。我们使其在ImageNet上工作的尝试没有成功。

items.en: We observe a steady improvement of the performance of our method as we increase the dimensionality of the embeddings (i.e. of the last layer of the projector network). This intriguing result is in stark contrast with other popular methods for SSL, such as SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a) and BYOL (Grill et al., 2020), for which increasing the dimensionality of the embeddings rapidly saturates performance. It is a promising avenue to continue this exploration for even higher dimensional embeddings (>16,000absent16000>16{,}000), but this would require the development of new methods or alternative hardware to accommodate the memory requirements of operating on such large embeddings.
items.zh: 我们观察到，随着嵌入维度（即投影网络最后一层的维度）的增加，我们方法的性能稳步提升。这一有趣的结果与其他流行的自监督学习方法（如 SimCLR (Chen et al., 2020a) 和 BYOL (Grill et al., 2020)）形成鲜明对比，后者的嵌入维度增加会迅速使性能饱和。继续探索更高维度的嵌入（>16,000）是一个有前景的方向，但这需要开发新方法或替代硬件来满足处理如此大嵌入的内存需求。

items.en: Our method is just one possible instanciation of the Information Bottleneck principle applied to SSL. We believe that further refinements of the proposed loss function and algorithm could lead to more efficient solutions and even better performances. For example, the redundancy reduction term is currently computed from the off-diagonal terms of the cross-correlation matrix between the twin network embeddings, but alternatively it could be computed from the off-diagonal terms of the auto-correlation matrix of a single network’s embedding. Our preliminary analyses seem to indicate that this alternative leads to similar performances (not shown). A modified loss could also be applied to the (unnormalized) cross-covariance matrix instead of the (normalized) cross-correlation matrix (see Ablations for preliminary analyses).
items.zh: 我们的方法只是信息瓶颈原理应用于自监督学习的一种可能实例。我们相信，对提出的损失函数和算法的进一步改进可以带来更高效的解决方案和更好的性能。例如，冗余减少项目前是从孪生网络嵌入的互相关矩阵的非对角项计算的，但也可以从单个网络嵌入的自相关矩阵的非对角项计算。我们的初步分析似乎表明，这种替代方案会导致相似的性能（未显示）。修改后的损失也可以应用于（未归一化的）互协方差矩阵，而不是（归一化的）互相关矩阵（参见消融实验中的初步分析）。

items.zh: 我们感谢Pascal Vincent、Yubei Chen和Samuel Ocko在数学上与infoNCE损失的联系方面提供的深刻见解，感谢Robert Geirhos和Adrien Bardes在未包含在稿件中的额外分析，以及感谢Xinlei Chen、Mathilde Caron、Armand Joulin、Reuben Feinman和Ulisse Ferrari对稿件的有用评论。
